Say - Print to terminal.description: say("text") → Print text or values to the terminal

Ask - Get user input.description: ask("prompt") → Ask the user to type something. Returns what they typed.

Make - Declare a variable.description: make name = value → Create a variable

Make int - Integer variable.description: make int name = 0 → Create an integer (whole number) variable

Make str - String variable.description: make str name = "..." → Create a text/string variable

Make float - Decimal variable.description: make f name = 0.0 → Create a decimal number (float) variable

Set - Create a list.description: set name = [item1, item2] → Create a list

Fuc - Define a function.description: fuc name(args): → Define a new function

Rt - Return a value.description: rt value → Return a value from a function

If statement.description: if condition: → Run code only if condition is true

If / Else.description: if / else → Run one block if true, another if false

If / Elif / Else.description: if / elif / else → Multiple condition branches

Con Loop - For loop.description: con loop i in range(n): → Loop a set number of times

Con Loop - Loop over list.description: con loop item in list: → Loop through every item in a list

Won Loop - While loop.description: won loop condition: → Keep looping while condition is true

Stop - Break out of loop.description: stop → Exit the current loop immediately (break)

Skip - Skip to next iteration.description: skip → Skip the rest of this loop step and go to next (continue)

sig - Length.description: sig(x) → Returns the length of a string or list

pa - Minimum.description: pa(list) or pa(a, b) → Returns the smallest value

di - Maximum.description: di(list) or di(a, b) → Returns the largest value

abso - Absolute value.description: abso(x) → Returns the absolute (positive) value of a number

sqrt - Square root.description: sqrt(x) → Returns the square root of a number

floor - Round down.description: floor(x) → Round a number DOWN to the nearest integer

ceil - Round up.description: ceil(x) → Round a number UP to the nearest integer

rnd - Round.description: rnd(x, decimals) → Round a number to N decimal places

avg - Average.description: avg(list) → Returns the average (mean) of all numbers in a list

total - Sum.description: total(list) → Returns the sum of all numbers in a list

clamp - Keep in range.description: clamp(value, min, max) → Keep a value between a minimum and maximum

even - Is even?.description: even(n) → Returns TAR if the number is even, FYU if odd

odd - Is odd?.description: odd(n) → Returns TAR if the number is odd, FYU if even

chance - Random 0-1.description: chance() → Returns a random float between 0.0 and 1.0

dice - Random integer.description: dice(a, b) → Returns a random whole number between a and b (inclusive)

pick - Random item.description: pick(list) → Randomly pick and return one item from a list

shuffle - Shuffle list.description: shuffle(list) → Randomly shuffle all items in a list (in place)

upper - Uppercase.description: upper(text) → Convert a string to UPPERCASE

lower - Lowercase.description: lower(text) → Convert a string to lowercase

trim - Remove spaces.description: trim(text) → Remove spaces from the start and end of a string

split - Split string.description: split(text, separator) → Split a string into a list of parts

join - Join list.description: join(separator, list) → Join a list of items into one string

replace - Replace text.description: replace(text, old, new) → Replace all occurrences of old with new

has - Contains?.description: has(text_or_list, item) → Check if a string or list contains an item

startswith - Starts with?.description: startswith(text, prefix) → Check if a string starts with a given prefix

endswith - Ends with?.description: endswith(text, suffix) → Check if a string ends with a given suffix

repeat - Repeat string.description: repeat(text, n) → Repeat a string n times

chars - String to chars.description: chars(text) → Split a string into a list of individual characters

numwords - Word count.description: numwords(text) → Count the number of words in a string

pad - Center pad.description: pad(text, width) → Center a string within a given width

add - Add to list.description: add(list, item) → Add an item to the end of a list

cut - Remove from list.description: cut(list, item) → Remove the first occurrence of an item from a list

ind - Find index.description: ind(list, item) → Return the position (index) of an item in a list

del - Remove last.description: del(list) → Remove and return the last item from a list

cler - Clear list.description: cler(list) → Remove all items from a list

sort - Sort list.description: sort(list) → Return a sorted copy of a list. Use sort(list, TAR) for descending.

rev - Reverse list.description: rev(list) → Reverse a list in place

copy - Copy list.description: copy(list) → Return a copy of a list

howmany - Count in list.description: howmany(list, item) → Count how many times an item appears in a list

first - First item.description: first(list) → Return the first item of a list

last - Last item.description: last(list) → Return the last item of a list

unique - Remove duplicates.description: unique(list) → Return a new list with all duplicate items removed

merge - Merge two lists.description: merge(listA, listB) → Combine two lists into one new list

insert - Insert into list.description: insert(list, index, item) → Insert an item at a specific position in a list

flat - Flatten nested list.description: flat(list) → Flatten one level of a nested list into a single list

wait - Pause program.description: wait(ms) → Pause the program. 1000 = 1 second, 500 = half a second.

now - Current time.description: now() → Return the current time as a string (HH:MM:SS)

today - Today's date.description: today() → Return today's date as a string (YYYY-MM-DD)

rank - Get type.description: rank(value) → Return the type name of a value: 'int', 'str', 'float', 'list'...

tonum - Convert to number.description: tonum(x) → Convert a value to a number (int if possible, else float)

totext - Convert to string.description: totext(x) → Convert any value to a string

tolist - Convert to list.description: tolist(x) → Convert a value (like a string) into a list of characters

isnull - Is null?.description: isnull(x) → Check if a value is NULL (None). Returns TAR or FYU.

isnum - Is a number?.description: isnum(x) → Check if a value is a number (int or float). Returns TAR or FYU.

istext - Is a string?.description: istext(x) → Check if a value is a string (text). Returns TAR or FYU.

islist - Is a list?.description: islist(x) → Check if a value is a list. Returns TAR or FYU.

clear_screen - Clear terminal.description: clear_screen() → Clear all text from the terminal screen

zip_lists - Combine two lists.description: zip_lists(listA, listB) → Combine two lists into pairs: [(a1,b1), (a2,b2)...]
